repo_signals: fix a Postgres query plan and add a covering index

retrieval_query: feature store feast train serve skew temporal leakage target leakage encoding feature drift normalization

validation_smoke.name: code.feature-engineering L3 validation smoke
signals: the same feature definition produces identical values offline and online for a replayed entity
a point-in-time join excludes any value recorded after the label timestamp
feature drift is measured per feature against the training reference distribution

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.feature-engineering diagnosis smoke
signals: a feature's online value diverges from its offline backfill for the same entity and time
a model's offline metric is suspiciously high because a future-derived feature leaked
